description.unified: Charges a total of 2 time(s). On the first attack, moves behind the enemy and deals Physical Damage, knocking them down for [3 sec->1.8 sec]. On the second attack, moves behind the enemy with the highest Attack, dealing Physical Damage, knocking them down for [3 sec->1.8 sec], and increasing their Physical Damage taken by [25%->30%] for [10 sec->4 sec].

Removes your harmful effects and puts all allies into [Reading the Wind] state for [15 sec->10 sec], increasing Attack and Physical [Dodge->Evasion Chance] by [250->350]. When a target in [Reading the Wind] state successfully evades, all allies’ Critical Damage is increased by [5%->3%] for [20 sec->10 sec]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
Attacks enemies in a circular area around you, dealing Physical Damage and stunning them for [3 sec->1.8 sec]. This skill gains an additional 500 Physical Defense Penetration.

Increases Critical Hit Chance by [(added) 150], and Normal Attacks ignore the target’s damage reduction effects. On Normal Attack, has a 15% chance to deal additional Physical Damage, stunning the target for [1 sec->0.6 sec] and reducing their Physical Defense by [(added) 25%] for [(added) 5 sec]. [(removed) constant Defense and Pen boost.]

IV.unified: Stuns hit enemies for 3 sec. [(removed) DMG increased by 25%.]

dark.unified: On each attack, reduces the target’s Mana by [(added) 400]. [(removed) 25% P.DMG amp.]

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], and when triggered, removes all beneficial effects from all enemies.

dark.unified: Reduces the target’s Healing Effectiveness by 40% for [10 sec->6 sec].
At the start of battle, increases Defense Penetration by 400 for [20 sec->2 sec] and grants immunity to status ailments for [10 sec->5 sec]. The Defense Penetration increase cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: [Fierce Wind] increases DMG by 50% and P.DMG taken by the target by {0}% for 4 sec. [(removed) reduces mana on crit hit.]
[Wind Reading] All effects become irremovable and upon activation, heals own HP equal to {0}% of Max HP.
[Dive Bomb] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.
[Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by 10%, and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target’s Max HP. [(removed) Guild War restriction.]

On hit, increases the target’s Physical Damage taken by {0}% and reduces Status Ailment Resistance by {1} for 10 sec. If the target is a boss, damage dealt to the boss is increased by {2}%, and this boss damage increase effect stacks up to 10 times.
